name: Nao Shimura
description: Nao was the wife of [Kotarou Shimura](https://anilist.co/character/251812/Kotarou-Shimura) and the mother of their two children, [Tenko](https://anilist.co/character/89226/Tomura-Shigaraki) and [Hana](https://anilist.co/character/290001/Hana-Shimura). ~!She died when her son's Quirk went out of control.!~
